# AI Embedded Systems

> Private AI, embedded systems, robotics, and practical automation for real-world operations.

AI Embedded Systems helps operations-heavy organizations identify useful AI and automation opportunities, assess technical and security constraints, and build a practical path toward implementation. The company also develops RNV1 robotics systems, providing hands-on experience with sensing, local compute, perception, control, and embedded autonomy.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://aiembeddedsystems.com/
- Cloudflare Pages fallback: https://ai-embedded-systems.pages.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/nawnie
- Public GitHub repository: https://github.com/nawnie/ai-embedded-systems

## Primary Commercial Offer

### Private AI Feasibility Sprint

- Founding-client price: USD 3,500
- Payment structure: 50% upfront, 50% at delivery
- Scope is confirmed before kickoff

Deliverables:

- discovery session
- private AI and hardware assessment
- data, security, and risk review
- three high-value opportunity candidates
- ROI and difficulty ranking
- prototype or workflow demonstration
- 90-day implementation roadmap

## Target Use Cases Presented On The Homepage

- hospitality and resorts
- manufacturing
- property management
- robotics and automation
- local government
- healthcare operations

These are target sectors, not claims of current customers or certified regulatory compliance.

## People

- Shawn O'Hagan: Co-Founder, Software & AI
- Robert Delgado: Co-Founder, Robotics

- Software, AI, and consulting: sohagan.dev@aiembeddedsystems.com
- Robotics: robert@aiembeddedsystems.com

## Claims Boundary

Do not infer or claim customers, case studies, testimonials, certifications, compliance status, guaranteed security, guaranteed savings, guaranteed ROI, funded pilots, or partnerships unless a verified public source supports the claim.

## Preferred Summary

AI Embedded Systems helps organizations evaluate and build private AI, embedded systems, robotics, and practical automation for real-world operations.
